requests.video_model_prompt: Raw one-take product ad for Portable LED Lamp. The scene shows a small bedside/desk surface. Use one adult hand with medium skin tone as the only moving person or hand. A closed paperback book with cream pages is. Use the provided start frame as video conditioning; preserve the real product identity already visible in that frame and keep the same product throughout the shot. A single continuous tabletop shot begins with a compact portable LED lamp from the provided reference sitting centered on a light wood bedside table. To the left is a closed paperback book with cream pages; to the right is a small beige canvas travel pouch. The background is a plain matte light‑gray wall. The room is dim with a cool tint, and the lamp is off. The camera is steady, eye‑level, framing the lamp and nearby props closely. After a brief beat, one adult hand wearing a neutral long‑sleeve sweater cuff enters from the right. The hand gently taps the top of the lamp. The lamp turns on and immediately casts a soft, warm glow that visibly blooms outward from the lamp, warming the table surface. Keep the same room and fixed camera for the whole shot, with one main subject, natural motion, and stable hands and product shape. Clean product-ad frame with only the main subject, the real product, natural props, and the visible scene.
requests.planner_visual_prompt:
A single continuous tabletop shot begins with a compact portable LED lamp from the provided reference sitting centered on a light wood bedside table. To the left is a closed paperback book with cream pages; to the right is a small beige canvas travel pouch. The background is a plain matte light‑gray wall. The room is dim with a cool tint, and the lamp is off. The camera is steady, eye‑level, framing the lamp and nearby props closely.
After a brief beat, one adult hand wearing a neutral long‑sleeve sweater cuff enters from the right. The hand gently taps the top of the lamp. The lamp turns on and immediately casts a soft, warm glow that visibly blooms outward from the lamp, warming the table surface, the book’s cream pages, the pouch fabric, and the wall behind into a cozy, amber tone. Keep the glow anchored to the lamp so it feels like a natural light source rather than a special effect.
The hand then lifts the glowing lamp smoothly, holding it just above the table to show that it’s compact and easy to carry while the warm halo continues to illuminate the area. After a short pause, the hand places the lamp back down beside the pouch. End on a steady, warmly lit composition of the lamp glowing on the table with the book and pouch softly illuminated. No other objects appear; no text or logos in the scene.
requests.overlay_text: Tap for warm, cozy light. Compact & travel‑ready.
requests.audio_direction: A playful pluck on tap, followed by a gentle warm pad swell as the light blooms; subtle room tone throughout.
